title: Create: Industrial Horizons [Fabric]
description: Industrial Horizons combines mechanical innovation, advanced storage systems for a truly limitless experience.
body:
# **Industrial Horizons**

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d28fb10c6424c5ac93c679fa0ddcc282073b3764_0.webp)




#### Forge epic machines with Create's innovative tools. Build, fly, and explore limitless mechanical worlds. Transform ordinary Minecraft into an engineer's dream. Craft, contrapt, and conquer your wildest inventions!

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ZKwcjthq?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=%231bc90d) ![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/ZKwcjthq?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/ZKwcjthq?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=red) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1332989818975551550?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=DISCORD&color=blue)


## This Modpack includes:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Create
- Create: Steam n' Rails
- Create Big Cannons
- Create Crafts and Additions
- Create Dreams & Desires
- Create Jetpack
- Create Molten Vents
- Create Nuclear
- Immersive Aircrafts & Man of Many Planes
- Timeless and Classics Zero
- Terrain Generation: Tectonic & WWOO


</details>


### 📥 Installation
- **Modrinth App:** You can download and play the modpack directly in the official Modrinth App
- **Third party Launcher:** To install and play the modpack with the .mrpack file, follow the instructions [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/).
- **Server Side:** To install the server-side mods, you can use [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install) or [ServerPackCreator](https://github.com/Griefed/ServerPackCreator).


## Need a Minecraft server? Consider [Wasabi Hosting](https://wasabihosting.com/aff.php?aff=14)
